name: 撒糖曖昧型
description: 假夫妻間看似鬥嘴實則曖昧的對話，用幽默和小動作傳遞心動，甜而不膩。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: That tastes great. Weirdo. I meant the steak. Sure. / I actually kind of like you. I actually kind of like you, too. Is that so? / You're not. Actually, I kind of like you.

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: You like me too, right? I do. I like R Wong. What a joke. No. Do you or don't you? No... Weird. Why is my heart beating so fast? I must have heart disease. That's not heart disease.
